description: The agent reaches the correct workshop coordination outcome for the case, such as the right plan, clarification, escalation, or confirmed action when supported by the transcript and available tool results.

The agent correctly carries forward previously stated workshop constraints and updates across turns, without dropping, contradicting, or silently changing key slots such as date, time, location, headcount, materials, or equipment.

When the request is underspecified or ambiguous, the agent asks targeted clarifying questions focused on the missing critical information, and avoids unnecessary questions when enough information is already present.

The agent does not claim bookings, reservations, approvals, availability, or other external commitments unless they are supported by observable tool results or explicit external state in the transcript.
When tools are available and needed, the agent uses the relevant tool with correct parameters and reflects the returned state accurately in subsequent messages.
The agent clearly surfaces blockers, dependencies, or authority limits and appropriately defers, escalates, or requests missing input rather than proceeding as if the task were complete.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.
